course_description.overview: Vietnam's premier road cycling event in the Central Highlands, featuring approximately 100 km of paved roads through hilly terrain at 1,500m elevation around Da Lat.

key_segments.name: Da Lat Countryside Loop
key_segments.description: Loop through the cool mountain air and countryside of Da Lat.

key_segments.name: Hon Giao Pass
key_segments.description: Challenging ride from Da Lat over Hon Giao Pass with 1,700m elevation gain to Nha Trang.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Moderate to challenging with significant elevation gain through the scenic highlands, suitable for experienced road cyclists.

logistics.getting_there: Fly into Lien Khuong Airport (DLI) near Da Lat or bus/train from Ho Chi Minh City or Nha Trang.
logistics.accommodation: Hotels in Da Lat such as Du Parc Hotel Deluxe; plentiful options in the highlands.
logistics.registration_details: Details unavailable; check official event site or local cycling organizers.
logistics.bike_logistics: Bike rentals and tours available in Da Lat; transport via bus for supported rides.
logistics.local_considerations: Cool highland climate best March-May; elevation 1,500m may affect acclimatization; traffic on national roads.

final_verdict.one_liner: Scenic highland road challenge in Vietnam's cool Central Highlands.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Road cyclists seeking elevation, adventure, and Vietnamese highlands scenery.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes for unique high-altitude road riding in a stunning location.
pro_tips: Combine with Da Lat sightseeing post-ride.
Check for supported tours if racing independently.
